rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee for contracts, eq for equations, const for constants, assign for assignments
Place component type contracts in type scopes, implementation contracts in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations, nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
Use case-provided bounds, constants, or visible relations for type scope assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Delete or rewrite AGREE clauses that reference unresolved identifiers
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use if...then...else for branching logic in AGREE
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
